description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages (test, docs, deploy) using alpine for most jobs and ubuntu for PDF generation. In the docs stage add a doxygen_manual job that runs on alpine and executes: apk --no-cache add python3 doxygen git; pip3 install doxypypy; git log --graph > docs/git_graph_changelog.txt; git log --date=short --pretty='format:**[%cd][%h]** (%cn) %n> %s%n' > docs/git_changelog.md; cd docs; chmod 755 py_filter; mkdir _build; doxygen doxy_config; and publishes ./docs/_build/ as an artifact named Headless_Manual_${CI_COMMIT_TAG}_${CI_COMMIT_SHA} kept for one month. In the deploy stage add a doxygen_pdf job (ubuntu) that runs only on tags or the cicd_testing branch, runs: apt-get -y update; DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -y install texlive make; DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -y install texlive-latex-recommended texlive-pictures texlive-latex-extra; cd docs/_build/latex; make pdf; cp refman.pdf "../../../Headless_PDF_Manual_${CI_COMMIT_TAG}.pdf"; and stores Headless_PDF_Manual_${CI_COMMIT_TAG}.pdf as an artifact named Headless_PDF_Manual_${CI_COMMIT_TAG}_${CI_COMMIT_SHA} kept for three months (allow_failure:true), plus a pages job (alpine) that runs only on tags or cicd_testing, moves ./docs/_build/html to ./public, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. In the test stage add a pylint job (alpine) that allows failure, runs: apk --no-cache add python3 grep; pip3 install pylint~=1.9.0; find . -iname "*.py" | xargs pylint | tee docs/syntax_test.md || if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "Fault(s) found"; else echo "Pass"; fi; if grep -q 'E:\|F:' docs/syntax_test.md; then exit 66; else echo "No fatal or error messages found"; fi; and always uploads docs/syntax_test.md as an artifact named Pylint_Results_${CI_COMMIT_SHA} kept for one month. Also in the test stage add a hashing_doxygen_manual job (alpine) that runs on all non‑tag commits (except tags), runs before_script: apk --no-cache add sed; cd docs/; then script: sed -i -e "s/PROJECT_NUMBER         = 4773687/PROJECT_NUMBER         = $CI_COMMIT_SHA/" doxy_config; and saves ./README.md and ./docs/doxy_config as a 3‑hour artifact, and a tagging_doxygen_manual job (alpine) that runs only on tags, runs the same before_script, then echoes a release message, replaces PROJECT_NUMBER with $CI_COMMIT_TAG in doxy_config, updates README.md with the tag URL, echoes the release message again, and stores the same artifacts.
